channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform UK gets £9m in donations in first quarter of 2026, including £7m from two crypto billionaires – UK politics live
item.description: Reform UK gets £9m in donations in first quarter of 2026, including £7m from two crypto billionaires – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Missing Mandelson messages from minister Darren Jones revealed
item.description: Missing Mandelson messages from minister Darren Jones revealed

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant Yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’
item.description: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant Yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files: The key takeaways from latest release of disgraced peer’s messages with Starmer’s top ministers
item.description: Mandelson files: The key takeaways from latest release of disgraced peer’s messages with Starmer’s top ministers

item.title: FT UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ he was sacked as US envoy

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s chief secretary consoled Mandelson after dismissal as US ambassador, undisclosed texts show

item.title: BBC Politics: Victims of Jeffrey Epstein ignored by government, says former minister
item.description: Victims of Jeffrey Epstein ignored by government, says former minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Nigel Farage condemned for ‘exploiting’ murder of Henry Nowak
